final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumn atmosphere and poetic, serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an 东方美学 minimalist aesthetic with natural poetry and warmth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth of field — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" wordmark as a focal brand element alongside natural autumn elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact natural setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, golden-hour healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (深秋棕红), #E8DCCB (米色), #D4A574 (金棕色) as the dominant palette
Materials/textures: needs a warm, organic surface treatment evoking natural materials — exact texture is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
